upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pra rocyasyA uzaso na sUraH (f॰1.121.6) na praroci=nABAt=nodaBAsata
'kiM prarocate' (Sa॰brA01.6.2.3) prarocate=rucivizayI Bavati
'aTEByo'gniH prArocata' (Sa॰brA॰3.2.3.9) agnistEH samagaMstetyarTaH
'ya eByo yajYaM prArocayat' (Sa॰brA॰1.6.2.5)

'yajYamezAM rucavizayatAmApAdayat teByaH (fziByaH) devA vEva prarocayAYcakruH svayaM cEva daDrire' (Sa॰brA॰1.6.2.3) fzizu rucimutpAdayAYcakruH viDivihitamarTavAdaprarocitaM mantreRa smftamaByudayakAri Bavati prarocitam=praSastam stutyA preritam
'kzuDAM karoti praruciM tanoti' (vEdyajIvane 135) praruciH prakfzwA ruciH
'yaduzo yAsi BAnunA saMsUryeRa rocase' (f॰8.8.18) saMrocase=samakAlaM rocase dIpyase
'ado yadavarocate catuzpakzamivacCadiH' (aTarva0 373) avaBAsate avaSabdo rocanasyAsAkalyamAha evaM virocate ityasya pratidvandvi Bavatyavarocata iti
'niragnayo rurucurniru sUryaH' (f0 8320) nIrurucuH sutarAM pradIpya parARunuduH (ahim) sopasargako ruciriha sakarmakaH
'agne bfhad vi rocase tvaM GfteBirAhutaH' (f0 274) virocase dIpyase samidDo Bavasi
'saMsfzwaM brahmaRA kzatraM BUya eva vyarocata' (BA0 vana0 264) ukto'rTaH
'tatrasTEraTa tErbARarmAdriputro vyarocata' (BA0 karRa0 2417)
'alAtacakravaccEva vyarocata mahIM gataH' (BA0 droRa0 11548) pratyaBAdityarTaH
'yo brAhmaRo vidyAmanUcya na virocate' (tE0 saM0 2128) na virocate lokasyArcito na Bavati yaSasvI na saYjAyate
'yayA vidyayA na viroceta' (Apa0 Da0 22515) anantarodIrita evArTaH
'dIptinirjitavirocanAdayaM gAM virocanasutAdaBIpsataH…svarpateH' (SiSu0 1474) virocanaH sUryaH svarpatirindraH
'dve karmaRI naraH kurvannasmi~lloke virocate' (BA0 u0 3354) virocate viSezeRa dIpyate
'saM dUto adyOduzaso viroke' (f0 352) viroko vyuzwiH viBAnam
'dUre citsantaLidivAti rocase' (f0 1947) atiSayena dIpyasa ityarTaH
'yaH parasyAH parAvatastiro DanvAtirocate' (f0 101872) atirocate'tiBAsate
'atyarocata tAnsarvAnDfzwadyumnaH samAgatAn' (BA0 droRa0 2381) atyarocata DAmnAtyaSeta
tvamagne kratuBiH…udarocaTAH (aTarva0 13323) udarocaTA uccEradIpyaTAH
'Darmo'Birocate yasmAd DarmarAjastataH smftaH' (mArka0 pu0) aBirocate rAjate dIpyate SoBate aBirviSezako na
'yadaBirocate Bavate' (vikrama0 2) yaTA'tra Bavato'BiruciH yaTA te vaSaH yaTA te CandaH
'upo ruruce yuvati rna yozA' (f0 7771) uparuruce rocamAnA BAsamAnopEtItyarTaH

prayoga.literature_text: yadi vo rocate vfttaM janakasya mahAtmanaH
viBajAma tataH sarvA vivAdo me na rocate
ajAmuKyA yaduktaM hi tadeva mama rocate
asatyAni ca yudDAni saMSayo me na rocate
na hi me tena hInAyA vAsassvarge'pi rocate
kiM karomi kaTaM vA te rocate pratiyAmi
mama pratipradAnaM hi rAvaRasya na rocate
